headline: AG's office cleared 8 ministers in 14 months
context: Attorney General Ahmad Terrirudin cleared eight cabinet ministers of corruption allegations between January 2025 and March 2026 without any cases reaching trial.

cards.big: Eight ministers cleared by AG chambers — zero went to trial
cards.sub: All investigations closed with NFA status in record turnaround times

cards.big: Average investigation-to-clearance time was just 47 days per minister
cards.sub: Regular citizens' cases average 18 months before receiving NFA decisions

cards.big: Three cleared ministers oversaw contracts worth RM2.1 billion combined
cards.sub: Procurement irregularities flagged by Auditor General were not pursued further

cards.big: AG appointment process still lacks parliamentary confirmation hearing
cards.sub: Malaysia remains one of few democracies where AG serves at PM's pleasure

cards.big: Speed of clearance raises questions about depth of investigation, not innocence
Should AG clearances of politicians require public disclosure of reasoning?
